signal_title: Development of an EU Age Verification Solution
risk_rationale: The introduction of a privacy-preserving age verification solution aligns with the EU's DSA provisions for minor protection. While TikTok's current baseline includes age detection and assurance measures, the new EU blueprint may require enhancements to align with privacy-preserving standards, posing a medium risk that can be resolved within a quarter.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Blueprint for privacy-preserving age verification allowing users to prove they are over 18 without disclosing additional personal information.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: TikTok's current age assurance methods may not fully align with the EU's privacy-preserving age verification blueprint, which emphasizes minimal data disclosure.

remediations.title: Implement Privacy-Preserving Age Verification
remediations.description: Develop and integrate a privacy-preserving age verification solution that aligns with the EU blueprint, ensuring users can verify their age without disclosing additional personal information.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification solution is implemented and operational.
Solution aligns with EU privacy-preserving standards.
User feedback indicates no additional personal information is required for age verification.

business_impact: The implementation of a privacy-preserving age verification solution may require moderate engineering resources but could enhance user trust and compliance with EU regulations, potentially reducing the risk of fines or restrictions.
recommended_actions: Conduct a feasibility study for implementing the EU age verification blueprint.
Collaborate with privacy experts to ensure compliance with EU standards.
Monitor regulatory updates for any changes in the effective date or additional requirements.
